---
title: "besgsdag_10_5f76"
subtitle: "`besgsdag_10_5f76`"
description: "besgsdag_10_5f76"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/besgsdag_10_5f76/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                                      | Title                                   | Type     | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|-------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                                   | The unique name of the event            | string   | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `center`                                  | Research center                         | string   | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `date_v10`                                | date_v10                                | date     | Date of visit. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `staff_initials_v10`                      | staff_initials_v10                      | string   | Initials of the study staff member responsible for conducting the visit. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `identified_name_cpr_v10`                 | identified_name_cpr_v10                 | string   | Indicates whether the participant has been identified by full name and personal identification number (CPR). Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `relative_v10`                            | relative_v10                            | string   | Indicates whether a relative or accompanying person is present at the visit. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `relative_name_v10`                       | relative_name_v10                       | string   | The name of the relative attending the visit. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `fasting_status_v10`                      | fasting_status_v10                      | string   | Indicates if the participant has been fasting since 10 pm the night before. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `last_meal_time_v10`                      | last_meal_time_v10                      | datetime | Indicates the time of the participant's last meal before the visit. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `food_intake_nonfast_v10`                 | food_intake_nonfast_v10                 | string   | Indicates what food and when the participant has eaten it, if the participant has not been fasting from 10 pm the day before the visit. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `alcohol_v10`                             | alcohol_v10                             | string   | Indicates if the participant has avoided alcohol the past 24 hours. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `alcohol_intake_v10`                      | alcohol_intake_v10                      | string   | Indicates how much alcohol the participants has had and when the past 24 hours. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `caffeine_v10`                            | caffeine_v10                            | string   | Indicates if the participant has avoided caffeinated beverages the past 24 hours. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `caffeine_intake_v10`                     | caffeine_intake_v10                     | string   | Indicates how much caffeine the participants has had and when the past 24 hours. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `no_exercise_24h_v10`                     | no_exercise_24h_v10                     | string   | Indicates if the participant did any intense activity or excercise the past 24 hours. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `exercise_24h_v10`                        | exercise_24h_v10                        | string   | Indicates how much intense activity or exercise the participant did and when the past 24 hours. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `smoking_v10`                             | smoking_v10                             | string   | Indicates if the participant has avoided smpking since the night before. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `smoking_amount_v10`                      | smoking_amount_v10                      | string   | Indicates how much smoking the participant has done and when since last night. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `no_medication_before_v10`                | no_medication_before_v10                | string   | Indicates if the participant took medication the morning before the visit. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `medication_before_v10`                   | medication_before_v10                   | string   | Description of the medication the participant took the morning before the visit. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `not_active_transportation_v10`           | not_active_transportation_v10           | string   | Indicates if the participant used motorized/not-active transportation to SDCC before the visit. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `transportation_v10`                      | transportation_v10                      | string   | Description of the active transportation before the visit. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `adverse_events_v10`                      | adverse_events_v10                      | string   | If there has been any adverse events. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `home_urin_v10`                           | home_urin_v10                           | string   | Indicates whether the participant has collected urin 4 days at home like instructed. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `home_urin_received_v10`                  | home_urin_received_v10                  | string   | Indicates if we received the collected home urin. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `home_urin_return_v10`                    | home_urin_return_v10                    | string   | Date for return home urin sample. Visit 10                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `stool_sample_v10`                        | stool_sample_v10                        | string   | Indicates whether the participant brought a stool sample like instructed. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `stool_sample_return_v10`                 | stool_sample_return_v10                 | string   | Date for return of the stool sample. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `cgm_returned_v10`                        | cgm_returned_v10                        | string   | Indicates whether the partipant has returned the CGM put on at visit 9. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `cgm_when_v10`                            | cgm_when_v10                            | string   | If CGM not returned at visit, when then. Workflow. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `cgm_discontinue_v10`                     | cgm_discontinue_v10                     | string   | Indicates whether the CGM was taken off/ fell off before the planned measuring period was over. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `cgm_discontinue_why_v10`                 | cgm_discontinue_why_v10                 | string   | Indicates why and when the CGM was taken off/ fell off. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `cgm_when_info_v10`                       | cgm_when_info_v10                       | string   | Has staff been notified when the CGM will be returned. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `cgm_reader_v10`                          | cgm_reader_v10                          | string   | Number on the CGM reader. Visit 10. Derived using the formula: [besg_9_arm_1][cgmreader_v9]                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `libreview_v10`                           | libreview_v10                           | string   | Whether the CGM data has been uploaded via Libre View. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `cgm_csvsaved_ldrive_v10`                 | cgm_csvsaved_ldrive_v10                 | string   | Cgm data in csv-file saved on L-drive. Workflow. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `cgm_pdfsaved_ldrive_v10`                 | cgm_pdfsaved_ldrive_v10                 | string   | AGP rapport with cmg data saved on L-drive. Workflow. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `cgm_glucosedata_upload_v10`              | cgm_glucosedata_upload_v10              | string   | Upload of cgm data (csv-file). Workflow. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `cgm_avg_v10`                             | cgm_avg_v10                             | number   | Average glucose measured by CGM. Mmol/L. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `sens_returned_v10`                       | sens_returned_v10                       | string   | SENS returned. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `sens_early_removal_v10`                  | sens_early_removal_v10                  | string   | Indicates if the SENS device fell off/ was taken off before the decided measuring time was over. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `sens_early_removal_why_v10`              | sens_early_removal_why_v10              | string   | Indicates why and when the SENS device was taken off. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `sens_returning_date_v10`                 | sens_returning_date_v10                 | string   | Date for returned SENS. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `sens_nr_v10`                             | sens_nr_v10                             | string   | SENS number. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `sens_upload_ldrive_v10`                  | sens_upload_ldrive_v10                  | string   | SENS data saved on L-drive. Workflow. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `sens_upload_v10`                         | sens_upload_v10                         | string   | Upload sens activity file in excel. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `sensor_reuse_v10`                        | sensor_reuse_v10                        | string   | Is the sensor put in the right reuse box. Workflow. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `saliva_sample_v10`                       | saliva_sample_v10                       | string   | Indicates if the participant has delivered a saliva sample. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `urin_sample_v10`                         | urin_sample_v10                         | string   | Indicates if the participant has delivered a urin sample done at the day of the visit. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `hba1c_v10`                               | hba1c_v10                               | string   | Indicates if the participant has had HbA1c taken. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `hba1c_value_v10`                         | hba1c_value_v10                         | number   | HbA1c value, mmol/mol. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `type_of_clothing_whr_v10`                | type_of_clothing_whr_v10                | string   | Indicates what type of clothing the participant is wearing during the waist and hip measurements. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `waist_1_v10`                             | waist_1_v10                             | number   | Waist measurement 1 in cm. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `waist_2_v10`                             | waist_2_v10                             | number   | Waist measurement 2 in cm. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `waist_average_v10`                       | waist_average_v10                       | string   | The average of the waist measurements in cm. Visit 10. Derived using the formula: ([waist_1_v10]+[waist_2_v10])/2                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `hip_1_v10`                               | hip_1_v10                               | number   | Hip measurement 1 in cm. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `hip_2_v10`                               | hip_2_v10                               | number   | Hip measurement 2 in cm. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `hip_average_v10`                         | hip_average_v10                         | string   | The average of the two hip measurements in cm. Visit 10. Derived using the formula: ([hip_1_v10]+[hip_2_v10])/2                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `waist_hip_ratio_v10`                     | waist_hip_ratio_v10                     | string   | The waist hip ratio in cm. Calculated using the average of the 2 waist measurements and 2 hip measurements. Visit 10. Derived using the formula: [waist_average_v10]/[hip_average_v10]                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `dxa_metal_v10`                           | dxa_metal_v10                           | string   | Indicates whether the participant has any metal parts in their body. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `dxa_which_metal_v10`                     | dxa_which_metal_v10                     | string   | Indicates the type of metal in the participants body, if any. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `dxa_contraindicated_v10`                 | dxa_contraindicated_v10                 | string   | Indicates whether the participant has had contrast fluid injected within the past week. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `pregnancy_test_v10`                      | pregnancy_test_v10                      | string   | Indicates if the participant can be pregnant. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `pregnancy_test_result_v10`               | pregnancy_test_result_v10               | string   | Indicates if the pregnancy test was positive or negative. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `empty_bladder_v10`                       | empty_bladder_v10                       | string   | Indicates if participant has emptied bladder before dxa scan. Workflow. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `height_v10`                              | height_v10                              | string   | Participant's height in meters, measured with a stadiometer to the nearest 0.1 cm. Visit 10. Derived using the formula: [besg_1__screening_arm_1][height_v1]                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `weight_v10`                              | weight_v10                              | number   | Participant's weight in kilograms, measured with light clothing using a digital scale. Measured to the nearest 0.1 kg. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `weight_room_v10`                         | weight_room_v10                         | string   | Indicates which scale in which room that was used for weighing the participant. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `weight_garmin_v10`                       | weight_garmin_v10                       | number   | The participant's weight on the digital Garmin scale in the participant's home. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `bmi_v10`                                 | bmi_v10                                 | string   | Body Mass Index (BMI) in kg/m², calculated from weight and height. Visit 10. Derived using the formula: round(([weight_v10])/(([height_v10])^(2)), 1)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `dxa_performed_v10`                       | dxa_performed_v10                       | string   | Indicates if the DXA is perfomed. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `staff_initials_dxa_v10`                  | staff_initials_dxa_v10                  | string   | Initials of the study staff member responsible for conducting the DXA scan. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `dxa_upload_ldrive_v10`                   | dxa_upload_ldrive_v10                   | string   | DXA results saved on L-drive. Workflow. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `dxa_upload_v10`                          | dxa_upload_v10                          | string   | DXA data upload. Workflow. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `food_pref_test_v4_glasses_v10`           | food_pref_test_v4_glasses_v10           | string   | Indicates if the participant performed the test with or without glasses at visit 4. Visit 10. Derived using the formula: [besg_4_arm_1][food_pref_test_glasses_v4]                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `food_pref_test_performed_v10`            | food_pref_test_performed_v10            | string   | Indicates if the participant has performed the food preference test. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `food_pref_test_glasses_v10`              | food_pref_test_glasses_v10              | string   | Indicates if the participant has performed the test with or without glasses. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `fibro_performed_v10`                     | fibro_performed_v10                     | string   | FibroScan performed. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `fibro_not_performed_why_v10`             | fibro_not_performed_why_v10             | string   | Indicates why the fibro scan was not perfomed in case it is not. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `fibro_probe_size_v10`                    | fibro_probe_size_v10                    | string   | Indicates the size of the probe used for the fibro scan. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `staff_initials_fibro_v10`                | staff_initials_fibro_v10                | string   | Initials of the study staff member responsible for conducting the fibro scan. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `fibro_upload_ldrive_v10`                 | fibro_upload_ldrive_v10                 | string   | Indicates whetner or not the fibroscan is saved on the L-drive. Workflow. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `fibro_upload_v10`                        | fibro_upload_v10                        | string   | Fibroscan data upload. Workflow. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `bp_chosen_arm_v10`                       | bp_chosen_arm_v10                       | string   | Arm used for  blood pressure measurements. Visit 10. Derived using the formula: [besg_2_arm_1][bp_chosen_arm_v2]                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `sys_bp_1_v10`                            | sys_bp_1_v10                            | number   | Systolic blood pressure in mmHg, first measurement.  Participant sitting, measured after approximately 10 minutes of rest. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `dia_bp_1_v10`                            | dia_bp_1_v10                            | number   | Diastolic blood pressure in mmHg, first measurement.  Participant sitting, measured after approximately 5-10 minutes of rest. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `pulse_1_v10`                             | pulse_1_v10                             | number   | Pulse in bpm first measurement.  Participant sitting, measured after approximately 5-10 minutes of rest. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `sys_bp_2_v10`                            | sys_bp_2_v10                            | number   | Systolic blood pressure in mmHg, second measurement.  Participant sitting, measured after approximately 5-10 minutes of rest. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `dia_bp_2_v10`                            | dia_bp_2_v10                            | number   | Diastolic blood pressure in mmHg, second measurement.  Participant sitting, measured after approximately 5-10 minutes of rest. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `pulse_2_v10`                             | pulse_2_v10                             | number   | Pulse in bpm second measurement.  Participant sitting, measured after approximately 5-10 minutes of rest. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `sys_bp_3_v10`                            | sys_bp_3_v10                            | number   | Systolic blood pressure in mmHg, third measurement.  Participant sitting, measured after approximately 5-10 minutes of rest. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `dia_bp_3_v10`                            | dia_bp_3_v10                            | number   | Systolic blood pressure in mmHg, third measurement.  Participant sitting, measured after approximately 5-10 minutes of rest. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `pulse_3_v10`                             | pulse_3_v10                             | number   | Pulse in bpm third measurement.  Participant sitting, measured after approximately 5-10 minutes of rest. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `sys_bp_avg_v10`                          | sys_bp_avg_v10                          | string   | Automatically calculated as the mean of the three systolic BP measurements. Visit 10. Derived using the formula: if( ( if([sys_bp_1_v10] <> "", 1, 0) + if([sys_bp_2_v10] <> "", 1, 0) + if([sys_bp_3_v10] <> "", 1, 0) ) > 0,  ( if([sys_bp_1_v10] <> "", [sys_bp_1_v10], 0) + if([sys_bp_2_v10] <> "", [sys_bp_2_v10], 0) + if([sys_bp_3_v10] <> "", [sys_bp_3_v10], 0) ) / ( if([sys_bp_1_v10] <> "", 1, 0) + if([sys_bp_2_v10] <> "", 1, 0) + if([sys_bp_3_v10] <> "", 1, 0) ),  "" )  |
| `dia_bp_avg_v10`                          | dia_bp_avg_v10                          | string   | Automatically calculated as the mean of the three diastolic BP measurements. Visit 10. Derived using the formula: if( ( if([dia_bp_1_v10] <> "", 1, 0) + if([dia_bp_2_v10] <> "", 1, 0) + if([dia_bp_3_v10] <> "", 1, 0) ) > 0,  ( if([dia_bp_1_v10] <> "", [dia_bp_1_v10], 0) + if([dia_bp_2_v10] <> "", [dia_bp_2_v10], 0) + if([dia_bp_3_v10] <> "", [dia_bp_3_v10], 0) ) / ( if([dia_bp_1_v10] <> "", 1, 0) + if([dia_bp_2_v10] <> "", 1, 0) + if([dia_bp_3_v10] <> "", 1, 0) ),  "" ) |
| `pulse_avg_v10`                           | pulse_avg_v10                           | string   | Automatically calculated as the mean of the three pulse measurements. Bpm. Visit 10. Derived using the formula: if( ( if([pulse_1_v10] <> "", 1, 0) + if([pulse_2_v10] <> "", 1, 0) + if([pulse_3_v10] <> "", 1, 0) ) > 0,  ( if([pulse_1_v10] <> "", [pulse_1_v10], 0) + if([pulse_2_v10] <> "", [pulse_2_v10], 0) + if([pulse_3_v10] <> "", [pulse_3_v10], 0) ) / ( if([pulse_1_v10] <> "", 1, 0) + if([pulse_2_v10] <> "", 1, 0) + if([pulse_3_v10] <> "", 1, 0) ),  "" )               |
| `finapres_arm_cuff_size_v10`              | finapres_arm_cuff_size_v10              | string   | Finapres measurement: Size of arm cuff (S, M or L) at visit 2. Visit 10. Derived using the formula: [besg_2_arm_1][finapres_arm_cuff_size_v2]                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `finapres_finger_cuff_size_v10`           | finapres_finger_cuff_size_v10           | string   | Finapres measurement: Size of finger cuff (S, M or L) at visit 2. Visit 10. Derived using the formula: [besg_2_arm_1][finapres_finger_cuff_size_v2]                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `finapres_minus20_v10`                    | finapres_minus20_v10                    | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 1, performed approximately 20 minutes prior to the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `bloodsample_minus15_v10`                 | bloodsample_minus15_v10                 | string   | Record whether the participant completed bloodsample measurement 1, performed approximately 15 minutes prior to the intervention. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `vas_minus10_v10`                         | vas_minus10_v10                         | string   | Record whether the participant completed VAS 1, performed approximately 10 minutes prior to the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `bloodsample_minus5_v10`                  | bloodsample_minus5_v10                  | string   | Records whether a bloodsample was taken at time -5. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `timer_started_v10`                       | timer_started_v10                       | string   | Record whether the timer was started at the time of test drink consumption (defined as time 0). Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `mmtt_shake_bar_v10`                      | mmtt_shake_bar_v10                      | string   | Record whether the participant completed both shake and bar. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `shake_bar_time_min_v10`                  | shake_bar_time_min_v10                  | string   | The number of minutes it took the participant to consume the test shake and bar, if the total consumption time exceeded 10 minutes. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `mmtt_shake_v10`                          | mmtt_shake_v10                          | string   | The amount of the shake the participant drank. Text field. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `mmtt_bar_v10`                            | mmtt_bar_v10                            | string   | The amount of the bar the participant ate. Text field. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `finapres_time15_v10`                     | finapres_time15_v10                     | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 2, performed approximately 15 minutes after the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `bloodsample_time30_v10`                  | bloodsample_time30_v10                  | string   | Record whether a bloodsample was taken at time 30. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `vas_time30_v10`                          | vas_time30_v10                          | string   | Record whether the participant completed VAS 2, performed approximately 30 minutes into the intervention. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `finapres_time45_v10`                     | finapres_time45_v10                     | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 3, performed approximately 45 minutes after the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `bloodsample_time60_v10`                  | bloodsample_time60_v10                  | string   | Record whether a bloodsample was taken at time 60. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `vas_time60_v10`                          | vas_time60_v10                          | string   | Record whether the participant completed VAS 3, performed approximately 60 minutes into the intervention. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `finapres_time75_v10`                     | finapres_time75_v10                     | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 4, performed approximately 75 minutes after the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `bloodsample_time90_v10`                  | bloodsample_time90_v10                  | string   | Record whether a bloodsample was taken at time 90. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `vas_time90_v10`                          | vas_time90_v10                          | string   | Record whether the participant completed VAS 4, performed approximately 90 minutes into the intervention. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `finapres_time105_v10`                    | finapres_time105_v10                    | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 5, performed approximately 105 minutes after the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `bloodsample_time120_v10`                 | bloodsample_time120_v10                 | string   | Record whether a bloodsample was taken at time 120. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `vas_time120_v10`                         | vas_time120_v10                         | string   | Record whether the participant completed VAS 5, performed approximately 120 minutes into the intervention. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `finapres_time135_v10`                    | finapres_time135_v10                    | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 6, performed approximately 135 minutes after the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `bloodsample_time180_v10`                 | bloodsample_time180_v10                 | string   | Record whether a bloodsample was taken at time 180. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `vas_time180_v10`                         | vas_time180_v10                         | string   | Record whether the participant completed VAS 6, performed approximately 180 minutes into the intervention. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `finapres_time195_v10`                    | finapres_time195_v10                    | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 7, performed approximately 195 minutes after the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `bloodsample_time240_v10`                 | bloodsample_time240_v10                 | string   | Record whether a bloodsample was taken approximately 240 minutes into the intervention. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `vas_time240_v10`                         | vas_time240_v10                         | string   | Record whether the participant completed VAS 7, performed approximately 240 minutes into the intervention. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `finapres_time255_v10`                    | finapres_time255_v10                    | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 8, performed approximately 255 minutes after the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `finapres_upload_ldrive_v10`              | finapres_upload_ldrive_v10              | string   | Indicates whetner or not the Finapres data is saved on the L-drive. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `medicine_change_v10`                     | medicine_change_v10                     | string   | If there has been any changes in the participants medical record since the last visit. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `medicine_change_info_v10`                | medicine_change_info_v10                | string   | Confirms that the information has been entered in the instrument 'medicinændringer'. Yes/no. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `survey_answered_v10`                     | survey_answered_v10                     | string   | Survey answered. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `food_v10`                                | food_v10                                | string   | Food delivered. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `scipd_performed_v10`                     | scipd_performed_v10                     | string   | Whether the participant completed SCIP-D. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `scip_list_test_v10`                      | scip_list_test_v10                      | number   | Whether the participant completed the scip list test. visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `scip_consonant_test_v10`                 | scip_consonant_test_v10                 | number   | Whether the participant has completed the consonant test. visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `scip_word_mobilizing_v10`                | scip_word_mobilizing_v10                | number   | Whether the participant completed the word mobilizing test. visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `scip_delayed_recall_v10`                 | scip_delayed_recall_v10                 | number   | Whether the participant completed the recall test. visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
