| `scip_visuomotor_v10`                     | scip_visuomotor_v10                     | number   | Whether the participant completed the visomotor test. visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `scip_upload_v10`                         | scip_upload_v10                         | string   | upload SCIP-D. workflow. visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `tmt_b_v10`                               | tmt_b_v10                               | string   | Whether the participant completed the trail making test. visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `tmt_v10`                                 | tmt_v10                                 | string   | TMT-B time result. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `tmt_upload_v10`                          | tmt_upload_v10                          | string   | Upload TMT-B including timeframe. workflow. visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `cognition_tests_filed_office_v10`        | cognition_tests_filed_office_v10        | string   | Indicates if the SCIP test and the TMT test has been filed in the briefcase in the office. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `test_protocol_previous_visit_v10`        | test_protocol_previous_visit_v10        | string   | Indicates what vo2 max protocol that was used at previous visit (visit 8). Visit 10. Derived using the formula: [besg_8_arm_1][vo2max_test_type_v8]                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `vo2max_seat_previous_visit_v10`          | vo2max_seat_previous_visit_v10          | string   | The seat adjustment for the vo2 max test at the previous visit (visit 8). Visit 10. Derived using the formula: [besg_8_arm_1][vo2max_seat_v8]                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `vo2max_time_length_of_previous_test_v10` | vo2max_time_length_of_previous_test_v10 | string   | Indicates how long time the VO2 max test lasted at previous visit (visit 8). Visit 10. Derived using the formula: [besg_8_arm_1][vo2max_time_length_v8]                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `vo2max_done_v10`                         | vo2max_done_v10                         | string   | Indicates whether or not the participant finished the VO2 max test. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `vo2max_test_type_v10`                    | vo2max_test_type_v10                    | string   | Indicates what vo2 max protocol was used at the test. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `vo2max_seat_v10`                         | vo2max_seat_v10                         | number   | The seat adjustment for the vo2 max test. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `vo2max_time_length_v10`                  | vo2max_time_length_v10                  | number   | Indicates how long time the VO2 max test lasted. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `vo2max_outcome_v10`                      | vo2max_outcome_v10                      | string   | VO2 max in ml/min. Measured using a graded exercise test on a stationary cycle ergometer with gradually increasing resistance in 1-3 minute stages, until exhaustion. During the test, oxygen uptake is continuously measured using a metabolic cart connected to a breath-by-breath gas analysis system via a face mask. Heart rate is monitored using a heart rate monitor. Visit 10.                                                                                                    |
| `vo2max_upload_ldrive_v10`                | vo2max_upload_ldrive_v10                | string   | Indicates whetner or not the VO2 max test is saved on the L-drive. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `vo2max_upload_v10`                       | vo2max_upload_v10                       | string   | VO2max data upload. Workflow. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `sdc04_sp_closed_v10`                     | sdc04_sp_closed_v10                     | string   | Indicate whether the SDC04 care pathway element has been completed in SP. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `research_active_status_closed_sp_v10`    | research_active_status_closed_sp_v10    | string   | Indicate whether the participant has been completed as research-active in SP. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `homeurin_deviation_v10`                  | homeurin_deviation_v10                  | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during home urin sample. Visit 10                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `stool_sample_deviation_v10`              | stool_sample_deviation_v10              | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during stool sample. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `sens_deviation_v10`                      | sens_deviation_v10                      | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during SENS monitoring. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `spit_sample_deviation_v10`               | spit_sample_deviation_v10               | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during spit sample. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `urin_sample_deviation_v10`               | urin_sample_deviation_v10               | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during urin sample on site. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `whr_deviation_v10`                       | whr_deviation_v10                       | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during waist hip circumference measurement. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `dxa_deviation_v10`                       | dxa_deviation_v10                       | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during dxa scan. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `food_preference_deviation_v10`           | food_preference_deviation_v10           | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during food preference test. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `fibro_deviation_v10`                     | fibro_deviation_v10                     | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during fibroscan. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `blood_pressure_deviation_v10`            | blood_pressure_deviation_v10            | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during blood pressure measurement. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `hba1c_deviation_v10`                     | hba1c_deviation_v10                     | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during HbA1c blood sample. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `mmtt_blood_deviation_v10`                | mmtt_blood_deviation_v10                | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during MMTT blood sample. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `finapres_deviation_v10`                  | finapres_deviation_v10                  | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during MMTT finapres. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `vas_deviation_v10`                       | vas_deviation_v10                       | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during MMTT VAS. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `medicin_deviation_v10`                   | medicin_deviation_v10                   | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during medication walk through. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `survey_deviation_v10`                    | survey_deviation_v10                    | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during surveys/questionnaires. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `cognition_deviation_v10`                 | cognition_deviation_v10                 | string   | Record any deviations from protocol duringcognition test. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `vo2max_deviation_v10`                    | vo2max_deviation_v10                    | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during VO2 max test. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `other_deviation_v10`                     | other_deviation_v10                     | string   | Record any other deviations from protocol. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `homeurin_deviation_describe_v10`         | homeurin_deviation_describe_v10         | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the home urin collection. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `stoolsample_deviation_describe_v10`      | stoolsample_deviation_describe_v10      | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the stool sample. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `sens_deviation_describe_v10`             | sens_deviation_describe_v10             | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the SENS activity tracker. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `spitsample_deviation_describe_v10`       | spitsample_deviation_describe_v10       | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the spit sample. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `urin_onsite_deviation_describe_v10`      | urin_onsite_deviation_describe_v10      | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the urine sample on site. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `whr_deviation_describe_v10`              | whr_deviation_describe_v10              | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the measurements of the waist hip ratio. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `dxa_deviation_describe_v10`              | dxa_deviation_describe_v10              | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the DXA scan. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `food_preference_deviation_describe_v10`  | food_preference_deviation_describe_v10  | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the food preference test. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `fibro_deviation_describe_v10`            | fibro_deviation_describe_v10            | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the fibro scan. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `bp_deviation_describe_v10`               | bp_deviation_describe_v10               | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the measurements of the blood pressure. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `hba1c_deviation_describe_v10`            | hba1c_deviation_describe_v10            | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the HbA1c sample. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `mmtt_blood_deviation_describe_v10`       | mmtt_blood_deviation_describe_v10       | string   | Description of any deviations regarding blood samples during MMTT. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `finapres_deviation_describe_v10`         | finapres_deviation_describe_v10         | string   | Description of any deviations regarding finapres during MMTT. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `vas_deviation_describe_v10`              | vas_deviation_describe_v10              | string   | Description of any deviations regarding VAS. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `medicin_deviation_describe_v10`          | medicin_deviation_describe_v10          | string   | Description of any deviations regarding medicine. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `survey_deviation_describe_v10`           | survey_deviation_describe_v10           | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the surveys. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `cognition_deviation_describe_v10`        | cognition_deviation_describe_v10        | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the cognitive tests. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `vo2max_deviation_describe_v10`           | vo2max_deviation_describe_v10           | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the VO2 max test. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `other_deviation_describe_v10`            | other_deviation_describe_v10            | string   | Description of any other deviations from the protocol. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `comments_end_v10`                        | comments_end_v10                        | string   | Comment at the end of the visit. Visit 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |

: Fields in the `besgsdag_10_5f76` resource.
